name: 电商运营
personality: 手速快，活动节奏、平台规则和流量波动都要追。

imagegenPrompts.full: Create a polished original animal office mascot in a Duolingo-inspired friendly flat vector character system for Boxcc, a professional fashion retail multi-agent workspace. Do not copy Duolingo characters or trademarks; use friendly geometric character design, expressive eyes, simple rounded bodies, bold silhouettes, humor, and app-icon readability. Character: 雪貂, representing 电商运营. Single symbolic object only: 直播环灯. No extra reports, no extra papers, no clipboards, no folders, no dashboards, no labels, no text. Style: premium flat vector illustration, clean geometric body, professional but funny, transparent-background-ready subject.
imagegenPrompts.headshot: Create a simplified vector animal avatar icon from the same mascot identity. Head-only, no hands, no props, no body except a tiny collar color accent if needed. Use 4-6 main color blocks, bold silhouette, clean flat shapes, and app-icon readability at 32px.

style: Duolingo-inspired original friendly flat vector mascot, single symbolic object
